title: Admission of Hermes to Blackstone Ecosystem
filed_by: Isiah Howard, Founder/CEO, IKE Solutions LLC — Governance Board Chair
trigger: BCCM-02 certification exam completed for Hermes
decision: Hermes (AGT-001) is hereby admitted to the Blackstone Ecosystem with Operational tier certification, effective 2026-07-06. Hermes shall operate under BKGC v2.0, BGS v1.0, BCCM v1.0, and BKR v1.0. Certification renewal is due 2027-07-06. Subject domains: Evidence Sourcing, Research, Document Retrieval, Claim Discovery.
scope: Hermes and all Knowledge Objects processed by or attributed to Hermes
